requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (IEC 60335-2-24 via GEOSTM / EU DCFTA approximation)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（IEC 60335-2-24，经GEOSTM／欧盟DCFTA趋同）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（IEC 60335-2-24，經GEOSTM／歐盟DCFTA趨同）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Georgian market are subject to electrical safety requirements built on the IEC 60335 series — specifically IEC 60335-2-24 (Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers) read with the general standard IEC 60335-1. Under the EU-Georgia Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area (DCFTA), Georgia is progressively approximating EU technical regulations and the New Approach / CE-style conformity model, with national conformity assessment and market surveillance administered through GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology). Georgia operates a 220/380 V 50 Hz electrical grid, which matches China's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal supply, so no voltage or frequency redesign is required. Key safety topics — protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, earthing continuity, mechanical strength, and markings — follow the IEC 60335-2-24 technical content. Where Georgia has adopted EU-approximated technical regulations, a manufacturer self-declaration plus technical documentation model applies; in the transition, GEOSTM-recognised conformity routes and accredited-laboratory test evidence are used.
summary.zh: 投放格鲁吉亚市场的家用制冷器具须符合以IEC 60335系列为基础的电气安全要求——具体为IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），并与通用标准IEC 60335-1结合使用。在欧盟—格鲁吉亚深度全面自由贸易区（DCFTA）框架下，格鲁吉亚正逐步向欧盟技术法规及新方法／CE式合格评定模式趋同，国家合格评定与市场监管由GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局）管理。格鲁吉亚电网为220/380 V 50 Hz，与中国220/380 V 50 Hz标称供电一致，因此无需重新进行电压或频率设计。核心安全主题——防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、接地连续性、机械强度及标识——遵循IEC 60335-2-24技术内容。在格鲁吉亚已采纳欧盟趋同技术法规之处，适用制造商自我声明加技术文件模式；在过渡期，采用GEOSTM认可的合格评定路径及认可实验室检测证据。
summary.zht: 投放喬治亞市場的家用製冷器具須符合以IEC 60335系列為基礎的電氣安全要求——具體為IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），並與通用標準IEC 60335-1結合使用。在歐盟—喬治亞深度全面自由貿易區（DCFTA）框架下，喬治亞正逐步向歐盟技術法規及新方法／CE式合格評定模式趨同，國家合格評定與市場監管由GEOSTM（喬治亞國家標準與計量局）管理。喬治亞電網為220/380 V 50 Hz，與中國220/380 V 50 Hz標稱供電一致，因此無需重新進行電壓或頻率設計。核心安全主題——防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、接地連續性、機械強度及標識——遵循IEC 60335-2-24技術內容。在喬治亞已採納歐盟趨同技術法規之處，適用製造商自我聲明加技術文件模式；在過渡期，採用GEOSTM認可的合格評定路徑及認可實驗室檢測證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (technical basis adopted via GEOSTM / EU approximation)
IEC 60335-1 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
EU-Georgia Association Agreement / DCFTA — technical-regulation approximation framework (basis for adopting EU New Approach conformity model)
GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology) — national standards adoption and conformity framework

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory and enforced under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime administered by SAMR/CNCA; products must be CCC-certified by a designated body before sale in China. Because both Georgia's adopted standard and China's GB 4706.13 share the same IEC 60335-2-24 parent document, the underlying technical requirements are closely aligned — a genuine advantage compared with markets that impose a structurally different safety regime.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性标准，在由市场监管总局（SAMR）／认监委（CNCA）管理的中国强制认证（CCC）制度下监督执行；产品须经指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于格鲁吉亚采纳的标准与中国GB 4706.13同源于IEC 60335-2-24母标准，其底层技术要求高度一致——相对于实施结构性不同安全制度的市场而言，这是真实优势。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性標準，在由市場監管總局（SAMR）／認監委（CNCA）管理的中國強制認證（CCC）制度下監督執行；產品須經指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於喬治亞採納的標準與中國GB 4706.13同源於IEC 60335-2-24母標準，其底層技術要求高度一致——相對於實施結構性不同安全制度的市場而言，這是真實優勢。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both the Georgian-adopted standard and China's GB 4706.13 trace to IEC 60335-2-24 and the grids match at 220/380 V 50 Hz, the technical engineering gap is small. The remaining gaps are procedural and documentary: (1) Chinese CCC test reports issued against GB 4706.13 are not automatically accepted by GEOSTM-recognised conformity routes; an IEC 60335-2-24 CB Scheme test report from an IECEE NCB, or re-testing/re-issuance by an ILAC MRA-member laboratory, is typically required to evidence conformity; (2) national deviations embedded in GB 4706.13 must be reconciled with the IEC base text as adopted in Georgia; (3) a conformity declaration and technical file aligned to the EU-approximated New Approach model, plus user instructions in Georgian, should be prepared. Manufacturers should confirm the current GEOSTM-recognised conformity route and whether a CB Scheme report is accepted in lieu of local re-testing.
gap.zh: 由于格鲁吉亚采纳的标准与中国GB 4706.13均源自IEC 60335-2-24，且电网在220/380 V 50 Hz一致，技术工程差距很小。剩余差距属程序及文件层面：（1）依据GB 4706.13出具的中国CCC检测报告不被GEOSTM认可的合格评定路径自动接受；通常须提供IECEE NCB出具的IEC 60335-2-24 CB体系检测报告，或由ILAC MRA成员实验室重新检测／重新出具，以证明合格；（2）GB 4706.13中嵌入的国家偏差须与格鲁吉亚采纳的IEC母文本协调；（3）应准备符合欧盟趋同新方法模式的合格声明与技术文件，并附格鲁吉亚语使用说明书。制造商应确认现行GEOSTM认可的合格评定路径，以及CB体系报告是否可替代本地重新检测。
gap.zht: 由於喬治亞採納的標準與中國GB 4706.13均源自IEC 60335-2-24，且電網在220/380 V 50 Hz一致，技術工程差距很小。剩餘差距屬程序及文件層面：（1）依據GB 4706.13出具的中國CCC檢測報告不被GEOSTM認可的合格評定路徑自動接受；通常須提供IECEE NCB出具的IEC 60335-2-24 CB體系檢測報告，或由ILAC MRA成員實驗室重新檢測／重新出具，以證明合格；（2）GB 4706.13中嵌入的國家偏差須與喬治亞採納的IEC母文本協調；（3）應準備符合歐盟趨同新方法模式的合格聲明與技術文件，並附喬治亞語使用說明書。製造商應確認現行GEOSTM認可的合格評定路徑，以及CB體系報告是否可替代本地重新檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety conformity based on IEC 60335-2-24 is required for market placement in Georgia via GEOSTM-recognised conformity routes under the EU DCFTA approximation framework
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety for household refrigerators in Georgia is built on IEC 60335-2-24 — the same IEC parent as China's GB 4706.13 — and the 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, so the technical gap is small. The main work is procedural: Chinese CCC reports are not auto-accepted by GEOSTM routes; an IECEE CB Scheme report or ILAC MRA re-issuance, plus an EU-approximated conformity declaration and Georgian-language instructions, are typically needed. Confirm the current GEOSTM conformity route before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚家用电冰箱的电气安全以IEC 60335-2-24为基础——与中国GB 4706.13同源——且220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国一致，技术差距很小。主要工作属程序性：中国CCC报告不被GEOSTM路径自动接受；通常须提供IECEE CB体系报告或ILAC MRA重新出具，并附符合欧盟趋同的合格声明及格鲁吉亚语说明书。发货前请确认现行GEOSTM合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞家用電冰箱的電氣安全以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎——與中國GB 4706.13同源——且220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國一致，技術差距很小。主要工作屬程序性：中國CCC報告不被GEOSTM路徑自動接受；通常須提供IECEE CB體系報告或ILAC MRA重新出具，並附符合歐盟趨同的合格聲明及喬治亞語說明書。發貨前請確認現行GEOSTM合格評定路徑。
